name: Karakuri Ninja mdl 919 "Kuick"
name_jp: カラクリ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>忍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>にん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>九</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>イッ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>九</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ク</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card must attack if able. When this face-up card is selected as an attack target, change its battle position. When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard, select 1 Level 4 or lower "Karakuri" monster in your Graveyard, and Special Summon it in face-up Defense Position.

When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard, select 1 Level 4 or lower "Karakuri" monster in your Graveyard, and Special Summon it in face-up Defense Position.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
